rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow the customer to create a login account.
The system shall enable the customer to select required medicines for purchase.
The system shall allow customers to order medicines with a single click.
The system shall enable the customer to view the status of ordered medicines.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The customer must be able to create a login account.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Before it, the customer needs to create a login account and fill all the details like name, address, any id no, etc.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The customer should be able to select required medicines for purchase.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The customer selects the required medicines and orders them with a single click.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system must allow customers to order medicines with a single click.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The customer selects the required medicines and orders them with a single click.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The customer should be able to view the status of ordered medicines.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The client can able to view the status of the medicines.
